title: dryopteris coriacea
intro: Dryopteris coriacea, also known as the coriaceous wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris coriacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
